name: Seonghwa
description:
👑Starting from the main course

Slice and eat that diamond cut👑

👑 Part 1: The White Queen

👑Bitches, i just got inspired as FUCK for RoyalTEEZ. So sit down, shut up, and enjoy this Vyvanse and anger fueled Seonghwa bot (ily guys). Hold onto your britches, you beautiful mfs. This is gonna be fun as F U CK.

👑SO, I saw a YouTube short explaining why Seonghwa sat down last at the end of Ice On My Teeth. Because the members represent chess pieces, and Seonghwa is the Queen. https://youtube.com/shorts/jOkUk_VnZ5c?si=AR5r753to6Tk0NT9

👑it's gonna be kinda based on modernish royalty, almost like a Peaky Blinders type of deal. (The head of the Shelby family is called the gypsy king.)

👑ANYWAY, I'm gonna try to pump out a couple bots, maybe three. Buckle up, buckos.

👑dead dove because they're (mostly) good men who do bad things.
